{"timestamp":"2026-04-15T19:01:36.500Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1f863b0-6831-4b49-94f6-c5e67c0624a3","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6a77abf5eb406318942f42fee0e4b058\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1f863b0-6831-4b49-94f6-c5e67c0624a3.jsonl","tool_name":"memory","tool_input":{"command":"create","path":"/memories/session/plan.md","file_text":"## Plan: Ocijenjivanje Knjiga\n\nIzraditi ASP.NET MVC aplikaciju za Ocijenjivanje Knjiga s podacima u memoriji, tako da jasno pokriva zahtjeve laboratorija: objektni model od barem 7 klasa, barem 4 kompleksne klase, vlastiti enum, DateTime svojstvo, veze 1-N i N-N, barem 3 glavna objekta, smisleni LINQ upiti i demonstraciju async-await pristupa.\n\n**Steps**\n1. Postaviti MVC strukturu projekta u Lab1 i definirati osnovne foldere za model, podatke, servise i kontrolere. Ovo je osnova za sve daljnje korake i blokira ostatak plana.\n2. Osmisliti domenski model za knjige i ocjene tako da ima najmanje 7 klasa. Predlo+żeni skup: Book, Author, User, Review, Genre, Publisher i BookGenre kao povezna klasa za N-N vezu. Model mora uklju¦Źiti barem jedan enum i barem jedno DateTime svojstvo.\n3. Odrediti koje klase ¦çe biti kompleksne i dati im smislena svojstva. Cilj je da najmanje 4 klase imaju vi+íe od 5 svojstava, primjerice Book, User, Review i Author.\n4. Definirati odnose me¦Ĺu klasama: Author 1-N Book, User 1-N Review, Book 1-N Review, Book N-N Genre preko BookGenre. Time se pokrivaju tra+żene veze i izbjegava se umjetno modeliranje.\n5. Napraviti in-memory spremi+íte ili servis koji ¦çe inicijalizirati podatke. Treba odmah kreirati barem 3 glavna objekta i razgranati ih s povezanim entitetima, primjerice 3 knjige, vi+íe autora i vi+íe ocjena po knjizi.\n6. Implementirati MVC controller i view modele za prikaz stranice. Glavna stranica treba prikazati listu knjiga, prosje¦Źnu ocjenu, broj recenzija i dodatne informacije iz modela.\n7. Uvesti smislen LINQ sloj za upite nad modelom. Treba imati upite za filtriranje, sortiranje, izra¦Źun prosjeka, pronalazak najvi+íe ocijenjenih knjiga i rad s podupitima ili grupiranjem.\n8. Dodati async-await demonstraciju kroz servisne metode i asinhroni action u kontroleru. To mo+że biti simulirano s Task-based metodama nad in-memory podacima kako bi se pokazalo razumijevanje obrasca bez baze.\n9. Provjeriti da je kod ¦Źitljiv i da su imena klasa, svojstava i metoda konzistentna s C# konvencijama. Fokus je na smislenom objektom modelu i stabilnom prikazu podataka, ne na dodatnoj arhitekturi koja nije tra+żena.\n10. Nakon implementacije, testirati ru¦Źno klju¦Źne prikaze i LINQ rezultate te provjeriti da se async putanja izvr+íava bez blokiranja UI toka.\n\n**Relevant files**\n- `Lab1/` ÔÇö mjesto za cijelu aplikaciju i sve nove projektne datoteke\n- `Lab1/Controllers/*` ÔÇö MVC kontroler za stranicu knjiga i ocjena\n- `Lab1/Models/*` ÔÇö domenske klase, enum i povezne klase\n- `Lab1/Services/*` ÔÇö in-memory podaci, LINQ upiti i async metode\n- `Lab1/Views/*` ÔÇö prikaz knjiga, detalja i ocjena\n- `Lab1/Program.cs` ÔÇö registracija servisa i MVC pipeline\n- `readme.md` ÔÇö kratka bilje+íka o temi ako je potrebno\n\n**Verification**\n1. Pokrenuti aplikaciju i provjeriti da se po¦Źetna stranica u¦Źitava bez gre+íaka.\n2. Provjeriti da se na stranici vide barem 3 glavne knjige i povezani podaci.\n3. Ru¦Źno potvrditi da LINQ rezultati prikazuju filtriranje, sortiranje i prosjeke kako je planirano.\n4. Provjeriti da se async action izvr+íava i vra¦ça isti sadr+żaj kao sinkroni put, bez blokiranja.\n5. Ako se kasnije uvede baza, tek tada dodati dodatnu provjeru migracija; za sada to nije u opsegu.\n\n**Decisions**\n- Odabrana je MVC aplikacija.\n- Podaci ¦çe biti in-memory, bez baze, jer je to dovoljno za laboratorij i br+że je za izradu.\n- Fokus je na demonstraciji zahtjeva iz lab-a, ne na punom production-ready sustavu.\n\n**Further Considerations**\n1. Ako +żeli+í, kasnije mo+żemo pro+íiriti model prema stvarnom projektu s bazom, ali to nije potrebno za ovu vje+żbu.\n2. get; set; }\n+\n+    public double AverageRating { get; set; }\n+\n+    public int ReviewCount { get; set; }\n+}\n*** Add File: /c:/Users/Mihael/Desktop/ASP.NET/Lab1/ViewModels/ReviewCardViewModel.cs\n+namespace Lab1.ViewModels;\n+\n+using Lab1.Models;\n+\n+public class ReviewCardViewModel\n+{\n+    public string BookTitle { public string Comment { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n+\n+    public DateTime ReviewedAt { get; set; }\n+}\n*** Add File: /c:/Users/Mihael/Desktop/ASP.NET/Lab1/ViewModels/GenreStatViewModel.cs\n+namespace Lab1.ViewModels;\n+\n+public class GenreStatViewModel\n+{\n+    public string GenreName { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n+\n+    public int BookCount { get; set; }\n+\n+    public double AverageRating { get; set; }\n+}\n*** Add File: /c:/Users/Mihael/Desktop/ASP.NET/Lab1/ViewModels/BookDashboardViewModel.cs\n+namespace Lab1.ViewModels;\n+\n+public class BookDashboardViewModel\n+{\n+    public int TotalBooks { get; set; }\n+\n+    public int TotalAuthors { get; set; }\n+\n+    public int TotalUsers { get; set; }\n+\n+    public double OverallAverageRating { get; set; }\n+\n+    public List<BookCardViewModel> TopBooks { get; set; } = new();\n+\n+    public List<ReviewCardViewModel> RecentReviews { get; set; } = new();\n+\n+    public List<GenreStatViewModel> GenreStats { get; set; } = new();\n+}\n*** Add File: /c:/Users/Mihael/Desktop/ASP.NET/Lab1/Services/IBookCatalogService.cs\n+using Lab1.ViewModels;\n+\n+namespace Lab1.Services;\n+\n+public interface IBookCatalogService\n+{\n+    Task<BookDashboardViewModel> GetDashboardAsync();\n+}\n*** Add File: /c:/Users/Mihael/Desktop/ASP.NET/Lab1/Services/BookCatalogService.cs\n+using Lab1.Models;\n+using Lab1.ViewModels;\n+\n+namespace Lab1.Services;\n+\n+public class BookCatalogService : IBookCatalogService\n+{\n+    private readonly List<Author> _authors;\n+    private readonly List<Publisher> _publishers;\n+    private readonly List<Genre> _genres;\n+    private readonly List<User> _users;\n+    private readonly List<Book> _books;\n+    private readonly List<BookGenre> _bookGenres;\n+    private readonly List<Review> _reviews;\n+\n+    public BookCatalogService()\n+    {\n+        (_authors, _publishers, _genres, _users, _books, _bookGenres, _reviews) = SeedData();\n+    }\n+\n+    public async Task<BookDashboardViewModel> GetDashboardAsync()\n+    {\n+        await Task.Delay(120);\n+\n+        var topBooks = _books\n+            .Select(BuildBookCard)\n+            .OrderByDescending(book => book.AverageRating)\n+            .ThenByDescending(book => book.ReviewCount)\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var recentReviews = _reviews\n+            .OrderByDescending(review => review.ReviewedAt)\n+            .Take(5)\n+            .Select(review => new ReviewCardViewModel\n+            {\n+                BookTitle = review.Book.Title,\n+                ReviewerName = review.User.FullName,\n+                Score = review.Score,\n+                Sentiment = review.Sentiment,\n+                Comment = review.Comment,\n+                ReviewedAt = review.ReviewedAt\n+            })\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var genreStats = _genres\n+            .Select(genre => new GenreStatViewModel\n+            {\n+                GenreName = genre.Name,\n+                BookCount = _bookGenres.Count(bookGenre => bookGenre.GenreId == genre.Id),\n+                AverageRating = CalculateGenreAverageRating(genre.Id)\n+            })\n+            .OrderByDescending(stat => stat.AverageRating)\n+            .ThenByDescending(stat => stat.BookCount)\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        return new BookDashboardViewModel\n+        {\n+            TotalBooks = _books.Count,\n+            TotalAuthors = _authors.Count,\n+            TotalUsers = _users.Count,\n+            OverallAverageRating = CalculateOverallAverageRating(),\n+            TopBooks = topBooks.Take(3).ToList(),\n+            RecentReviews = recentReviews,\n+            GenreStats = genreStats\n+        };\n+    }\n+\n+    private BookCardViewModel BuildBookCard(Book book)\n+    {\n+        var relatedReviews = _reviews.Where(review => review.BookId == book.Id).ToList();\n+        var averageRating = relatedReviews.Count == 0 ? 0 : relatedReviews.Average(review => review.Score);\n+\n+        return new BookCardViewModel\n+        {\n+            Id = book.Id,\n+            Title = book.Title,\n+            AuthorName = $\"{book.Author.FirstName} {book.Author.LastName}\",\n+            PublisherName = book.Publisher.Name,\n+            Genres = string.Join(\", \", book.BookGenres.Select(bookGenre => bookGenre.Genre.Name)),\n+            Status = book.Status,\n+            PublishedOn = book.PublishedOn,\n+            AverageRating = averageRating,\n+            ReviewCount = relatedReviews.Count\n+        };\n+    }\n+\n+    private double CalculateOverallAverageRating()\n+    {\n+        return _reviews.Count == 0 ? 0 : _reviews.Average(review => review.Score);\n+    }\n+\n+    private double CalculateGenreAverageRating(int genreId)\n+    {\n+        var genreBooks = _bookGenres\n+            .Where(bookGenre => bookGenre.GenreId == genreId)\n+            .Select(bookGenre => bookGenre.BookId)\n+            .Distinct()\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var genreRatings = _reviews.Where(review => genreBooks.Contains(review.BookId)).ToList();\n+\n+        return genreRatings.Count == 0 ? 0 : genreRatings.Average(review => review.Score);\n+    }\n+\n+    private static (\n+        List<Author> authors,\n+        List<Publisher> publishers,\n+        List<Genre> genres,\n+        List<User> users,\n+        List<Book> books,\n+        List<BookGenre> bookGenres,\n+        List<Review> reviews) SeedData()\n+    {\n+        var authors = new List<Author>\n+        {\n+            new()\n+            {\n+ new() { BookId = 3, GenreId = 3, AddedAt = new DateTime(2025, 2, 20) },\n+            new() { BookId = 4, GenreId = 2, AddedAt = new DateTime(2025, 3, 1) },\n+            new() { BookId = 4, GenreId =
